## 🚀 Featured projects

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🏢 Schindler Uzbekistan
**Corporate website · Elevators & escalators**

Full single-page site with animated product showcases, projects modal, fully responsive across all breakpoints. Russian localization.

`React` `CSS Animations` `Responsive`

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🔍 SAFELIFT Inspection
**ISO/IEC 17020 landing page**

Trilingual landing for technical inspection company. Premium aesthetics, smooth scroll, conversion-optimized layout.

`HTML/CSS` `JavaScript` `i18n`

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🤖 SQB AI Trainer
**Hackathon · BWAI 2026**

AI trainer for bank client communication. Real-time feedback via Gemini API, scenario library, deployed on Vercel with custom domain.

`React` `TypeScript` `Gemini API`

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 📊 SQB Report Builder
**Hackathon · BWAI 2026**

Automates financial report generation from Excel. Reduces manual work from hours to seconds.

`React` `FastAPI` `Python`

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🎮 Doom-style Raycaster
**Raycasting engine from scratch · C++**

Real-time 3D perspective from a 2D map, custom texture mapping, classic FPS-style rendering.

`C++` `Game Engine` `Graphics`

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### 🌍 Voxel World
**Minecraft-inspired terrain · C++ + Three.js**

Procedurally generated voxel terrain with chunk system. Built in both native C++ and WebGL.

`C++` `Three.js` `WebGL`

</td>
</tr>
</table>
